description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent gable roof and a large attached garage at the front. The exterior features a mix of light-colored walls and brickwork, with a concrete driveway leading up to the garage. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a well-defined lawn area surrounding it. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on the front and side facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is slightly recessed, accessed by a small set of steps and a modest porch area. The overall design is practical and typical of North American residential neighborhoods.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, attached garage, and symmetrical window rows, set on a grassy plot with a concrete driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway with steps, and driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the lawn, and the arrangement of windows along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, minimal window openings, and the expanse of the backyard lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side wall, roof overhang, and the driveway extending from the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with small steps, modest porch, and no prominent decorative elements.
